scope: wave2 fan-out gap-close: all 3 legacy streams are now migrated. candidates is a per-position sub-resource fan-out read expressed via the engine's fan_out dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2): it lists every position id (GET /positions, paginated) then repeats GET /position/{id}/candidates once per position, stamping position_id onto every record — closing the ENGINE_GAP that previously blocked this stream.
